body.text: Monday open: SCOTUS orders list is today's live event; NRA Foundation '1791' split raises a LaPierre-return scenario; murder down as gun suicides climb

Today's checkpoint is judicial: the Supreme Court releases an orders list at 9:30am ET, the first processing of last Thursday's conference. Watch for any reciprocity cert action and any Wolford movement.

facts.title: 2. VA hardware bans — 14 prosecutors; sales doubled; T-23
3. SCOTUS Wolford watch — orders list today; opinions Jun 11

body.text:
• SCOTUS orders list today 9:30am ET — Wolford pending, reciprocity cert watch
• NRA: '1791 Foundation' split; appellate ban is 10 yrs (corrected), not four
• New FBI/CDC read: murder near record lows; gun suicides climbing (Pew)
• Virginia: sales doubled (#2 long-gun); UBC injunction reaffirmed; ban T-23
